# Factory Role and User Management（工厂角色与用户管理）

## 1.Overall Process and Description（总体流程及说明）


[图片1: null]


**说明：**


1）角色代表一个一类操作属性，例如张三是TE，则TE是角色


2）每个角色都会有自己的操作权限，需要维护


3）每个操作员均需要一个账号，来记录操作和反溯


4）用户-角色关联后用户获得该角色的权限


1）A role represents a type of operational attribute. For example, if Zhang San is a TE, then TE is a role.
2）Each role has its own operational permissions, which need to be maintained.
3）Each operator must have an account to record operations and enable traceability.
4）After a user is associated with a role, the user gains the permissions of that role.


## 2.Detailed Explanation（详细讲解）


### 2.1 Role Management（角色管理）


[图片2: null]


说明 ：


1）系统管理-角色管理-业务管理角色


2）查看现有角色，点击前方下拉箭头可查看该角色下的用户


3）点击右上方功能权限，可以查看该角色可以使用系统功能的权限


4）点击“+”可以新建角色


1）System Management - Role Management - Business Management Roles
2）View existing roles; click the drop-down arrow in front to view the users under the role.
3）Click “Functional Permissions” in the upper right corner to view the system function permissions available to the role.
4）Click “+” to create a new role.


注意 ：1）角色名命名规范同一规则 2）系统初始化时，会给到工厂初始角色，工厂MES管理员需要自行配权限，和新增角色


Note: 1) The role name naming standards shall follow the same rule. 2) During system initialization, the factory’s initial roles will be provided; the factory MES administrator shall configure permissions and add new roles by themselves.


### 2.2Role Permission Maintenance（角色权限维护）


[图片3: null]


说明 ：


1）系统管理-角色管理-业务管理角色-选择对应角色-功能权限-勾选需要开放权限菜单栏


2）点击右上方功能权限，可以查看该角色可以使用系统功能的权限 ，勾选内容为现有的权限


3）需要新增菜单栏权限，找到对应菜单，勾选即可


1）System Management - Role Management - Business Management Roles - Select the corresponding role - Functional Permissions - Check the menu bar for which permissions need to be enabled.
2）Click “Functional Permissions” at the top right corner to view the system functional permissions available to the role; the checked items represent the existing permissions.
3）To add new menu bar permissions, find the corresponding menu and check it.


注意 ：1）角色即是权限的代表，维护权限时应注意不要放大权限，避免非岗位人员误操作 2）须点击保存才可生效 3）现有权限也可以通过编辑按钮修改


Attention：
1、A role represents the corresponding permissions. When managing permissions, please ensure that permissions are not unnecessarily expanded to prevent misoperations by personnel outside the designated position.
2、You must click “Save” for the settings to take effect.
3、Existing permissions can also be modified by clicking the “Edit” button.


### 2.3 create a new user（新建用户）


[图片4: null]


[图片5: null]


说明：


1）系统管理-用户管理-新增-输入内容-提交


2）需要查询用户，上方搜索框输入相应内容，搜索即可


3）点击新增可以增加用户账号


4）在所属角色可添加维护好的角色，此时该用户就有权限了


1) System Management > User Management > Add > Enter Information > Submit
2) To query a user, enter the corresponding information in the search box at the top and perform the search.
3) Click “Add” to create a new user account.
4) You can assign the pre-configured roles in the “Associated Roles” section; once assigned, the user will gain the corresponding permissions.


注意： 1）每位操作员均须有账号 2）工厂账号需要规则


### 2.4Create a new user & associate user with role（新建用户&用户角色关联）


[图片6: null]


[图片7: null]


说明 ：


1）系统管理-用户管理-勾选用户-角色管理-新增-选择需要赋予的角色-提交


2，点击角色管理也可查该用户的所在角色


3，点击新增可以增加用户账号


4，在所属角色可添加维护好的角色，此时该用户就有权限了


1) System Management > User Management > Select the user (via checkbox) > Role Management > Add > Choose the role(s) to assign > Submit
2) Click “Role Management” to also view the roles that the user currently has.
3) Click “Add” to create a new user account.
4) In the “Associated Roles” section, you can add pre-configured roles; once added, the user will obtain the corresponding permissions.


注意： 1）每位操作员均须有账号 2）工厂账号需要规则
